name: SweeGen, Inc.
summary: SweeGen, Inc. develops, produces, and distributes nature-based and non-caloric sweeteners for the food, flavor, and beverage industries. The company was formerly known as Aceway Corp. and changed its name to SweeGen, Inc. in January 2015. SweeGen, Inc. was incorporated in 2013 and is based in Rancho Santa Margarita, California.
